positive: A majestic, stylized fox silhouette leaping across a minimalist landscape of stylized mountains and abstract floral elements. The design must feature a deep indigo and burnt orange color palette, accented with metallic gold lines. High contrast, clean vector art aesthetic, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Central composition, vibrant yet earthy tones, bold linework, isolated subject, symmetrical balance, perfect for merchandise printing.
